markdown:
<title level="1" right="Swashbuckler Style " pfs="Standard">[Battledancer](/Styles.aspx?ID=1)</title>

**Source** [Advanced Player's Guide](/Sources.aspx?ID=39) pg. 84

To you, a fight is a kind of performance art, and you command your foes' attention with mesmerizing motions. You are trained in Performance and gain the [Fascinating Performance](/Feats.aspx?ID=781) skill feat. You gain panache during an encounter when the result of your [Performance](/Skills.aspx?ID=12) check to [Perform](/Actions.aspx?ID=59) exceeds the Will DC of an observing foe, even if the foe isn't [fascinated](/Conditions.aspx?ID=14).

<title level="2" right="9th">Exemplary Finisher</title>
You can Step as a free action immediately after the finisher.
name: Battledancer
search_markdown:
<additional-info>
**Source** [Advanced Player's Guide](/Sources.aspx?ID=39) pg. 84
</additional-info>

</summary>

text: Battledancer Source Advanced Player's Guide pg. 84 To you, a fight is a kind of performance art, and you command your foes' attention with mesmerizing motions. You are trained in Performance and gain the Fascinating Performance skill feat. You gain panache during an encounter when the result of your Performance check to Perform exceeds the Will DC of an observing foe, even if the foe isn't fascinated. Exemplary Finisher You can Step as a free action immediately after the finisher.

markdown:
<title level="1" right="Swashbuckler Style " pfs="Standard">[Gymnast](/Styles.aspx?ID=10)</title>

**Source** [Player Core 2](/Sources.aspx?ID=227) pg. 161

You reposition, maneuver, and bewilder your foes with daring feats of physical prowess. You are trained in [Athletics](/Skills.aspx?ID=36). When you [Grapple](/Actions.aspx?ID=2376), [Reposition](/Actions.aspx?ID=2379), [Shove](/Actions.aspx?ID=2380), or [Trip](/Actions.aspx?ID=2382), the action gains the [bravado](/Traits.aspx?ID=801) trait.

<title level="2" right="9th">Exemplary Finisher</title>
If the foe is [grabbed](/Conditions.aspx?ID=77), [restrained](/Conditions.aspx?ID=90), or [prone](/Conditions.aspx?ID=88), you gain a circumstance bonus to the damage roll equal to double the number of weapon damage dice.
name: Gymnast
search_markdown:
<additional-info>
**Source** [Player Core 2](/Sources.aspx?ID=227) pg. 161
</additional-info>

---

</summary>

text: Gymnast Source Player Core 2 pg. 161 You reposition, maneuver, and bewilder your foes with daring feats of physical prowess. You are trained in Athletics. When you Grapple, Reposition, Shove, or Trip, the action gains the bravado trait. Exemplary Finisher If the foe is grabbed, restrained, or prone, you gain a circumstance bonus to the damage roll equal to double the number of weapon damage dice.

markdown:
<title level="1" right="Swashbuckler Style " pfs="Standard">[Rascal](/Styles.aspx?ID=11)</title>

**Source** [Player Core 2](/Sources.aspx?ID=227) pg. 161

You aren’t afraid to use underhanded tactics to get the edge over your opponents. You are trained in [Thievery](/Skills.aspx?ID=50) and gain the [Dirty Trick](/Feats.aspx?ID=6472) general feat. When you use Dirty Trick, the action gains the [bravado](/Traits.aspx?ID=801) trait.

<title level="2" right="9th">Exemplary Finisher</title>
The foe takes a –10 circumstance penalty to its speed until the start of your next turn.
name: Rascal
search_markdown:
<additional-info>
**Source** [Player Core 2](/Sources.aspx?ID=227) pg. 161

markdown:
<title level="1" right="Swashbuckler Style " pfs="Standard">[Wit](/Styles.aspx?ID=12)</title>

**Source** [Player Core 2](/Sources.aspx?ID=227) pg. 161

You are friendly, clever, and full of humor, always knowing just what to say. Your witticisms leave foes unprepared for the skill and speed of your attacks. You are trained in [Diplomacy](/Skills.aspx?ID=39) and gain the [Bon Mot](/Feats.aspx?ID=6466) skill feat. When you use Bon Mot, the action gains the [bravado](/Traits.aspx?ID=801) trait.

<title level="2" right="9th">Exemplary Finisher</title>
The foe takes a –2 circumstance penalty to attack rolls against you until the start of your next turn.
name: Wit

You are trained in Diplomacy and gain the Bon Mot skill feat. When you use Bon Mot, the action gains the bravado trait. Exemplary Finisher The foe takes a –2 circumstance penalty to attack rolls against you until the start of your next turn.

markdown:
<title level="1" right="Swashbuckler Style " pfs="Standard">[Braggart](/Styles.aspx?ID=2)</title>

**Source** [Advanced Player's Guide](/Sources.aspx?ID=39) pg. 84

You boast, taunt, and psychologically needle your foes. You are trained in [Intimidation](/Skills.aspx?ID=7). You gain panache during an encounter whenever you successfully [Demoralize](/Actions.aspx?ID=53) a foe.

<title level="2" right="9th">Exemplary Finisher</title>
If the foe was temporarily immune to your [Demoralize](/Actions.aspx?ID=53), their temporary immunity ends.
name: Braggart

<additional-info>
**Source** [Advanced Player's Guide](/Sources.aspx?ID=39) pg. 84

You gain panache during an encounter whenever you successfully Demoralize a foe. Exemplary Finisher If the foe was temporarily immune to your Demoralize, their temporary immunity ends.

markdown:
<title level="1" right="Swashbuckler Style " pfs="Standard">[Fencer](/Styles.aspx?ID=3)</title>

**Source** [Advanced Player's Guide](/Sources.aspx?ID=39) pg. 84

You move carefully, feinting and creating false openings to lead your foes into inopportune attacks. You are trained in [Deception](/Skills.aspx?ID=5). You gain panache during an encounter whenever you successfully [Feint](/Actions.aspx?ID=48) or [Create a Diversion](/Actions.aspx?ID=45) against a foe.

<title level="2" right="9th">Exemplary Finisher</title>
The foe is [flat-footed](/Conditions.aspx?ID=16) until your next turn.
name: Fencer

<additional-info>
**Source** [Advanced Player's Guide](/Sources.aspx?ID=39) pg. 84

<title level="1" right="Swashbuckler Style " pfs="Standard">[Wit](/Styles.aspx?ID=5)</title>

**Source** [Advanced Player's Guide](/Sources.aspx?ID=39) pg. 85

You are friendly, clever, and full of humor, always knowing just what to say in any situation. Your witticisms leave foes unprepared for the skill and speed of your attacks. You are trained in [Diplomacy](/Skills.aspx?ID=6) and gain the [Bon Mot](/Feats.aspx?ID=2114) skill feat. You gain panache during an encounter whenever you succeed at a Bon Mot against a foe.

<title level="2" right="9th">Exemplary Finisher</title>
The foe takes a –2 circumstance penalty to attack rolls against you until the start of your next turn.
